gps101.title: GPS 101 Basic
gps101.subtitle: 15-Week Purpose Discovery Journey
gps101.description: Discover your life purpose through a structured 5-stage journey of self-reflection, problem identification, and project creation.

benefits.title: What You'll Gain
items: Clear understanding of your core identity

1.name: Identity
1.title: Who Am I?
1.question: Who am I at my core?
1.description: Deep self-reflection to understand your values, strengths, and passions
1.guidance: This stage is about authentic self-discovery. Explore who you are beyond roles and titles.
reflectionPrompts: What do people come to you for help with?
What activities make you lose track of time?
What injustices or problems make you angry or sad?
If you could change one thing about the world, what would it be?
What would you do if you knew you couldn't fail?

2.name: Problem
2.title: What Breaks My Heart?
2.question: What problem breaks my heart?
2.description: Identify a meaningful problem that resonates with your identity
2.guidance: Choose a problem that genuinely moves you. It should connect to who you are.
reflectionPrompts: What problems do you see that others seem to ignore?
What suffering have you witnessed that stays with you?
What problem, if solved, would make you feel like your life had meaning?
What issue do you find yourself talking about even when no one asks?
What problem connects to a personal experience in your life?

3.name: Owner
3.title: Who Needs This Solved?
3.question: Who is the problem owner?
3.description: Understand and tell the story of someone experiencing your problem
3.guidance: This is about empathy. Tell a real, specific story that shows the human impact.
reflectionPrompts: Who is most affected by this problem?
What does a typical day look like for them?
What barriers do they face? What have they tried?
How does this problem make them feel?
What do they dream of that this problem prevents?

4.name: Purpose
4.title: Why Am I Here?
4.question: What is my life purpose?
4.description: Synthesize identity and problem into a clear purpose statement
4.guidance: Connect your identity to your problem. Be specific about your intended impact.
reflectionPrompts: How does your identity uniquely position you for this problem?
What impact do you want to have in 10 years?
What legacy do you want to leave?
What would success look like?
How will you know you're living your purpose?

5.name: Project
5.title: What Will I Create?
5.question: What purpose-driven project will I launch?
5.description: Design a concrete project that embodies your purpose
5.guidance: Make it actionable. Describe something you can actually build and launch.
reflectionPrompts: What concrete solution could you create in 6-12 months?
Who would be your first users/beneficiaries?
What resources do you already have?
What would version 1.0 look like?
How will you measure impact?

identity.title: Identity Statement
identity.description: A clear articulation of who you are at your core
tips: Focus on your authentic self, not roles
Include core values and what drives you

problem.title: Life Problem Candidate
problem.description: A problem that deeply resonates with your identity
problem.placeholder: The problem that breaks my heart is...
tips: Choose something that genuinely moves you
Explain why it matters to you personally

owner.title: Problem Owner Story
owner.description: A narrative about someone experiencing your problem

purpose.title: Life Purpose Statement
purpose.description: Your unique purpose in addressing this problem

project.title: Purpose-Driven Project
project.description: A concrete project embodying your purpose
tips: Explain how it addresses your problem

checkpoint.title: GPS 101 Checkpoint
checkpoint.subtitle: Stage {{stage}} Reflection
checkpoint.instructions: Answer all reflection questions thoughtfully. Take your time - quality matters more than speed.

questions.understanding: What did you learn about yourself in this stage?
questions.application: How will you apply this learning?
questions.next: What are you excited about in the next stage?

validation.minLength: Please provide at least {{min}} characters for each answer
validation.thoughtful: Take time to reflect deeply on your answers

tips.connection: Connect each stage to the next
tips.patience: This is a journey, not a race

stageComplete.title: Stage {{stage}} Complete!
stageComplete.subtitle: {{stageName}} - Completed
stageComplete.message: Excellent work on completing Stage {{stage}}. Your {{deliverable}} has been saved.

journeyComplete.title: GPS 101 Journey Complete!
journeyComplete.subtitle: Orange Beacon Unlocked
journeyComplete.message: Congratulations! You've discovered your life purpose through GPS 101 Basic.
journeyComplete.rewards: You've earned the Orange Beacon and 5,000 Baraka
journeyComplete.quote: "The two most important days in your life are the day you are born and the day you find out why."

errors.notEnrolled: You must enroll in GPS 101 to access this content
errors.stageLocked: Complete Stage {{stage}} to unlock this stage
errors.loadError: Failed to load GPS 101 data. Please try again.
